Trigger.name: Get LS/DS Numbers
Trigger.script:
player_numbers = player_numbers or {created_ts = getTime(true, "yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.zzz"), ls_count = "unknown", ds_count = "unknown" }
cecho( f"\n There is(are): {player_numbers.ls_count} player(s) on LS and {player_numbers.ds_count} player(s) on DS as of " ..player_numbers.created_ts:match("(.+)%..+").."Z\n" )

Alias.name: Get LS/DS Numbers
Alias.script: local url = "https://api.writtenrealms.com/api/v1/wot/who/?format=json" local saveto = f"{getMudletHomeDir()}/player_numbers.json" downloadFile(saveto, url) send("who",false)

Script.name: playerNumbers
Script.script: function playerNumbers(event, filename) local dir = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/player_numbers.json" -- is the file that downloaded ours? if not filename:find("player_numbers.json", 1, true) then return end local file = io.open(dir, "r") local table = file:read("*all") io.close(file) player_numbers = yajl.to_value(table) end
